mnemonics.title: Propagation Path
mnemonics.content: JVM's Judgment: Just Understand Method Sequence - Java searches caller, then main, then JVM

mnemonics.title: Three Handling Methods
mnemonics.content: Try To Catch, Throw To Others, or Use UncaughtExceptionHandler - Three ways to handle uncaught exceptions

mnemonics.title: Stack Trace Steps
mnemonics.content: Identify, Find, and Trace - Steps to analyze a stack trace: Identify exception, Find source, and Trace call stack
